https://www.sustainista.net/hackathon.text: 0 Zum Inhalt springen Home Services Digitaler Produktpass ESG Analyse Product Carbon Footprint Klimawandelanpassung CSRD & Datenanalyse Hackathon Blog Kontakt Einloggen Konto Menü öffnen Menü schließen Home Services Digitaler Produktpass ESG Analyse Product Carbon Footprint Klimawandelanpassung CSRD & Datenanalyse Hackathon Blog Kontakt Einloggen Konto Menü öffnen Menü schließen Home Ordner: Services Zurück Digitaler Produktpass ESG Analyse Product Carbon Footprint Klimawandelanpassung CSRD & Datenanalyse Hackathon Blog Kontakt Einloggen Konto AI & Sustainability From May 15 to 17, 2026 , the Europe Tech Hackathon 2026 welcomes designers, innovators, and tech enthusiasts to the ÖBB Open Innovation Factory in Vienna . As a proud part of ViennaUP , Europe’s most dynamic startup festival, and hosted by Sustainista , this event challenges you to redefine the potential of AI agents. Together, we’ll tackle pressing challenges in sustainability, shaping solutions that create real-world impact. No matter your background, this is your chance to innovate, collaborate, and make a difference. Take part and be part of the transformation! GET YOUR TICKETS HERE! What is a hackathon? A hackathon is a collaborative event where programmers, designers, and entrepreneurs come together to develop software or hardware projects, often within a tight timeframe, to solve specific challenges or create innovative solutions. The Europe Tech Hackathon, organized by Sustainista, stands out as the premier event by emphasizing sustainability in tech, attracting top-tier talent passionate about creating impactful, eco-conscious technologies. This hackathon offers a unique platform for cross-disciplinary collaboration, access to cutting-edge resources, and mentorship from industry leaders, fostering an environment where groundbreaking green solutions are born. Don’t hesitate. Start your partnership with Sustainista! The Challenges Challenge 1: Needs to be defined for 2026 Join Us as a Partner in Driving Europe’s Tech Future The Europe Tech Hackathon, powered by Sustainista, brings together the most forward-thinking minds in sustainability, data, and digital transformation. Set at the intersection of purpose and innovation, this high-impact event offers a unique platform to co-create practical solutions for pressing challenges—from climate tech to inclusive digital infrastructure. We are currently seeking sponsors and strategic partners who share our vision for a resilient and tech-enabled Europe. Challenge 2: Needs to be defined for 2026 Amplify Your Impact through Sponsorship As a partner, you will gain visibility among Europe’s leading innovators, connect with top talent, and shape the agenda on sustainable technology. Whether through branding, challenge co-creation, or mentoring, your organization can help foster a vibrant ecosystem of change-makers. We invite you to help make this event not only possible, but truly transformative. Draft Agenda I Europe Tech Hackathon 2026 Friday May 15th 2026 I Kick-off, Ideation, Team building I only for Hackers 15.00: Doors open at the venue I Gaia Chatbot prepares participants 16:00: Official Kick-off I Hackathon Introduction 16:45: Workshops I tailored to each challenge with our incredible mentors 17:45: Begin hacking I mentoring sessions 17:30 to 19.30 HR Corner: Apply at our partners such as TCI Consult Work until 23.00 (or longer at home) Saturday May 16th 2026 I Full Day Working I only for Hackers 9.00 Space opens 10.00 to 14.00 Mentoring from 15+ Mentors 17.00 Pitch Training I Pre-Selection of pitching projects Work until 23.00 (or longer at home) Sunday May 17th 2026 I Finalize your Project & Pitch I Public event 9.00 Space opens I Coffee by ViennaUP Coffee Roasters 10.00 Doors open for visitors I Pitch event 10.30 to 12.00 Pitch Session Start Jury Jan Juriga (Wirtschaftsagentur Wien) , Kati Schneeberger (BEJ) , Tobias Amesberger (TCI Consult) , Johannes Adler (Investor) . 12.30 Award Ceremony & Media corner Start your partnership Main Partners Community Partners FAQ How will the Jury evaluate the solutions? Technology Quality & AI Execution (30%) The jury will assess the depth and credibility of the technical solution, whether there is a real prototype, and whether AI is integrated in a meaningful and technically justified way. Problem Fit & Solution Relevance (20%) Teams will be evaluated on how clearly they understand the challenge and whether their solution addresses a real and relevant problem for users, partners or the market. Design, UX & Process Logic (15%) This criterion looks at how intuitive, user-friendly and well-structured the solution is, as well as whether the overall process flow is logical and realistic. Business Model & Implementation Potential (15%) The jury will consider whether the idea has credible potential beyond the hackathon, including a realistic path to adoption, piloting or future rollout. Impact, Sustainability & Responsible AI (10%) This includes the potential environmental, social or economic value of the solution, as well as awareness of risks related to AI, privacy, bias and transparency. Pitch, Demo & Documentation Quality (10%) Teams will also be assessed on how clearly they present their project, how convincing the demo is, and how well the prototype is documented for review after the event. Can I sleep at the hackathon venue? No. Overnight stays at the venue are not possible. Participants will need to leave the ÖBB Open Innovation Factory at around 11:00 PM . Will food and drinks be provided? Yes. Drinks will be available, including Red Bull, coffee, water, and tea . Lunch will also be provided, and there will be a small meal or snack on Saturday evening . https://impactdays.at/.text: 0 Skip to Content HOME ABOUT AGENDA SPEAKERS STARTUPS INVESTORS Open Menu Close Menu HOME ABOUT AGENDA SPEAKERS STARTUPS INVESTORS Open Menu Close Menu HOME ABOUT AGENDA SPEAKERS STARTUPS INVESTORS Holding Tensions, Creating Impact. 18-19 May RATHAUS Vienna Value Extraction & Regeneration Value Extraction & Regeneration Value Extraction & Regeneration Stability & Change Stability & Change Stability & Change Nature & Technology Nature & Technology Nature & Technology Impact Days '26 Impact Days '26 Impact Days '26 Tensions Shaping the Impact Economy Nature and Technology Rather than treating nature, humans, and technology as separate domains, Impact Days ‘26 brings them into a single system. Nature sets the boundaries within which economies must operate. Humans bring values, judgment, care, and responsibility. Artificialsystems extend our capacity to sense, analyse, and act at scale. This tension is about integration rather than opposition. It asks how technologies, including artificial intelligence, can be designed to strengthen human agency and regenerate natural systems, rather than override, replace, or extract from them. Core question: How do we design technologies and systems that operate in service of human dignity and planetary health? Stability and Change Most economic and institutional systems are built on assumptions of stability, predictability, and control. The reality we face is one of accelerating change, complex feedback loops, and unintended consequences. Impact Days ‘26 explores how entrepreneurs, investors, and leaders can operate responsibly without the illusion of certainty. This includes rethinking metrics, governance models, and decision-making processes suited to complex adaptive systems; where not all outcomes can be forecast in advance. Core question: How do we lead, invest, and innovate when the most important outcomes cannot be fully predicted? Value Extraction and Regeneration Economic systems constantly move along a spectrum between value extraction and value regeneration. Extraction enables speed, efficiency, and concentration of returns, while regeneration sustains the social and ecological foundations on which long-term value creation depends. Anchored in the Donut Economy, this tension reframes success as operating within planetary boundaries while strengthening social foundations. Capital, enterprises, and innovation are examined not as ends in themselves, but as tools for long-term system health and resilience. Core question:What would it mean to design businesses and investments that leave systems better than they found them? https://viennaup.flave.world/user/events.text: Programme Log in Impact Days To book a ticket please kindly register or log in here . Please get your ticket in the external ticket shop Get your Ticket Description This year, Impact Days invites a different way of engaging with the future. Not by predicting it, simplifying it, or choosing sides, but by shaping it consciously, within the real limits that define our time. Holding Tensions, Creating Impact is the guiding idea for Impact Days ’26. As economic, ecological, technological, and social systems become increasingly intertwined, progress no longer comes from easy answers or single solutions. Impact Days ’26 is built around three core tensions shaping the impact economy today: Nature and Technology, Stability and Change, and Value Extraction and Regeneration. These are not problems to be solved, but relationships to be held, navigated, and designed with care. Impact Days ’26 is a space for learning how to work in this complexity. It is about making trade-offs visible, holding opposing forces in relationships, and shaping futures that can endure within social and planetary limits. The conference brings together entrepreneurs, investors, leaders, and system builders who are ready to engage with responsibility rather than certainty. Tickets Startup Application After you submit your application and choose your preferred host, our team will review all submissions and curate the table line-up (limited seats). We will get back to you via email with the result. FREE TICKET Description Step into the Viennese founder spirit at the ViennaUP Coffee House Sessions 2026 : invitation-style round tables where selected startups meet experienced investors and innovation managers for formal conversations, sharp questions, and connections that can move your venture forward. After registering, you’ll be asked to apply for one of three table hosts (Investor / Innovation Manager). The Vienna Business Agency team will then curate the final line-up to ensure the right mix of startups and topics at each table. Capacity is limited: 3 startups per host per session, so every seat at the table matters. This format is designed for startups that are beyond the early idea stage—typically with validated traction (e.g., MVP in market, first revenues, growth signals, or a clear scaling/fundraising roadmap). If you’re fundraising, scaling, or looking for strategic sparring and the right network, this is your moment. Sessions take place May 18–22 in morning and afternoon time slots, hosted in iconic Viennese coffee houses—where big ideas and bold decisions have always belonged. Apply now to secure your chance to join the Coffee House Sessions at ViennaUP 2026. The application will be open until the 4th of May. We will get back to you after the application deadline. When applying, please select your preferred host and briefly share your traction, goals, and what you want to discuss at the table. Tickets Energy Launchpad: Shaping Europe's Energy Future Join leading experts at the Energy Launchpad to explore how energy innovation moves from lab to market FREE TICKET Description From Lab to Market: Scaling Europe’s Energy Future Join the Energy Launchpad at ViennaUP! How can Europe transform energy research into scalable startups and spin-offs that strengthen the resilience of critical infrastructure? Climate change and cyber threats put growing pressure on critical infrastructure such as energy systems, and secure, market-ready solutions are required. The Energy Launchpad brings together startups, researchers, corporates, and investors to close critical commercialization gaps in the energy sector. Explore Europe’s biggest opportunities in the energy market - from securing hydropower infrastructure in Alpine regions to bridging the gap between university spin-offs and ventures. Find out how start-ups drive resilience of energy systems through AI, quantum computing, and innovative business models, and discover the impact of research on solving real-world problems. Our experts from leading DACH universities and corporations will share their insights on innovation and how to accelerate it. They will also discuss how to overcome regulatory and financing barriers, and how to build a robust European energy ecosystem. On top, you will gain valuable insights into the requirements for building resilient energy businesses. Join us to connect with key ecosystem players and help shape Europe’s energy future. https://launchpad.energy/.text: top of page Energy Launchpad Summer School About Us Menu Close Stay in Touch Energy Launchpad Shaping Europe's Energy Future The Energy Launchpad is a European innovation programme designed to turn cutting-edge energy research into venture-scale energy businesses. The Energy Launchpad has a clear mission: to promote European technologies and start-ups in a way that strengthens economic sovereignty and competitiveness. Spin-offs and start-ups receive support in entering the market and scaling up their ideas. At the same time, joint innovation projects are initiated that bring science and industry closer together. Another key component of the Energy Launchpad is the exchange of best practices with the aim of building a strong, Europe-wide ecosystem for energy innovation. Our Initiatives in 2026 Summer School Participate in a three-day workshop for students with start-up and spin-off ideas Energy Launchpad Award Win of the Energy Launchpad Awards for innovative energy start-ups from the DACH region Venture Clienting Challenges Industry use cases on AI & Quantum Computing and Resilience Ecosystem Side Events Meet us at numerous start-up and energy events and conferences throughout Europe Energy Launchpad Innovation Day Join us in Zurich during the Energy Week @ ETH, where bold energy ideas meet entrepreneurial talent. The Partners The Energy Launchpad unites leading universities, start-up ecosystems, and energy companies from across the DACH region. Each country is represented by one top university and one leading company: the Swiss Federal Institute of Technology Zurich (ETH Zurich) and Energie 360° from Switzerland, the Vienna University of Technology (TU Wien) and VERBUND AG from Austria, and the Technical University of Munich (TUM) , UnternehmerTUM GmbH and Energie Baden-Württemberg AG (EnBW) from Germany. ​ The founding institutions jointly launched the Energy Launchpad in October 2025, marking the beginning of a cross-border initiative to accelerate energy innovation. The Energy Launchpad is designed as a growing network. Additional partners from science, industry, and the broader European innovation ecosystem are invited to join forces, collaborate, and help drive forward the energy transition. meta: Lerne, wie du den perfekten Pitch für dein Startup, Projekt oder Business entwickelst, mit dem du Investoren, Kunden und Geschäftspartner begeisterst.
Der Perfekte Pitch - mit "Pitch Doktor" Dr. Florian Kandler
Lerne, wie du den perfekten Pitch für dein Startup, Projekt oder Business entwickelst, mit dem du Investoren, Kunden und Geschäftspartner begeisterst.
Der Perfekte Pitch
https://derperfektepitch.com.text: Start Über Über Florian Beratungsfokus Unterstützer WhatsApp Kanal Produkte Fundraising Winter Camp 2026 Arbeite 1:1 mit mir Workshop-Anfrage Im TV / 2m2m Bücher Business Devils Pitch Tips Startup Report Podcast Kundenerfolge Unternehmer:innen Akzeleratoren Start Über Über Florian Beratungsfokus Unterstützer WhatsApp Kanal Produkte Fundraising Winter Camp 2026 Arbeite 1:1 mit mir Workshop-Anfrage Im TV / 2m2m Bücher Business Devils Pitch Tips Startup Report Podcast Kundenerfolge Unternehmer:innen Akzeleratoren Newsletter » DER PERFEKTE PITCH Überzeuge Investoren, Kunden und Geschäftspartner von deinen Ideen und Produkten „Ich zeige dir, wie du den perfekten Pitch für dein Projekt, Produkt, Business oder Startup entwickelst, mit dem du Investoren, Kunden und Geschäftspartner begeisterst.“ — Dr. Florian Kandler (auch der „Pitch Doktor“ genannt) Fundraising Tipps erhalten » Pitch Tipps erhalten » Der Pitch Doktor ist offizieller Pitch Coach von: Der Pitch Doktor ist offizieller Pitch Coach von: Zugang zu meinem Newsletter sichern » Beratungs-Fokus Meine Beratung ist sehr stark fokussiert. Ich teile spezifisches Wissen, mit dem meine Klienten erfolgreich Kunden, Geschäftspartner und Investoren begeistern. Ich teile mein Wissen aus 20 Jahren Vertrieb und 15 Jahren als Unternehmer. Wissen aus meinen eigenen 3 Startups, die in Summe über 3 Millionen Euro von Investoren aus den USA, Deutschland und Österreich gewinnen konnten. Und Wissen aus meinen hunderten Coachings als offizieller Pitch-Coach von der Startup TV-Show „2 Minuten 2 Millionen“ und als Fundraising-Workshopleiter bei diversen Startup-Akzeleratoren und Corporat Innovation Porgrammen. Fundraising Bei der Investorensuche helfe ich Gründer:innen dabei, mit dem optimalen Aufwand an die besten Investoren heranzukommen. Gemeinsam optimieren wir die Chancen um Termine, Folgetermine und Investitionszusagen zu erhalten. Dazu gehört neben dem perfekten Pitch auch das Wissen um den 4-stufigen Fundraising-Prozess: von der Vorbereitung, Beziehungsaufbau, zum Outreach und Closing. Außerdem konkrete Strategien dazu, wie man Empfehlungen nutzt, wie man mit Investoren auf Augenhöhe ins Gespärch kommt und strategisch agiert, um Investoren aus der Wartehaltung zu holen und zu einer Investitionsenscheidung zu bewegen. Jetzt Fundraising Tipps erhalten » Mein "Business Angels Devils" Buch In diesem Buch verrate ich die versteckte Psychologie und Gedankenwelt von Business Angels. Du erfährst, was Business Angels wirklich wollen und wie du mit ihnen auf Augenhöhe verhandeln kannst. Dieses Buch habe ich auf Deutsch ganz persönlich, mit 0% KI und mit einigen lebhaften Anekdoten geschrieben und enthält viele meiner persönlichen Erlebnisse und Erfolgs-Strategien, die ich zur Investorensuche für meine eigenen Startups angewendet habe. Zum Business Devils Buch » Pitching Im Pitching helfe ich Menschen, ihre Idee, ihr Unternehmen oder ihr Angebot in kürzester Zeit so zu präsentieren, dass sie bei den Zuhörenden Neugier und echtes Interesse wecken. Das ist das Eintrittsticket in jede geschäftliche Beziehung oder Investition. Ein überzeugender Pitch entsteht, wenn Unterlagen und Präsentation perfekt aufeinander abgestimmt sind. Zudem sollte jeder Pitch an das jeweilige Format angepasst werden – ob auf der Bühne, online, im persönlichen Gespräch oder vor einer Gruppe. Selbst wenn der Pitch zunächst per E-Mail verschickt wird, etwa mit dem Ziel, überhaupt ein Gespräch zu vereinbaren, muss er präzise und ansprechend formuliert sein. Jetzt Pitch Tipps erhalten » Mein "Pitch Tips" Buch In diesem Buch verrate ich 33 meiner beliebtesten Tipps zur Optimierung deines Pitches. In jedem der dreiunddreißig Kapitel zeige ich dir die Methodik, die Psychologie und die konkrete Anwendung eines „Werkzeugs“, das du direkt auf deinen eigenen Pitch anwenden kannst, um ihn gezielt zu verbessern. Das Buch ist von mir auf Englisch und mit 0% KI verfasst und enthält zahlreiche Kniffe, die ich selbst regelmäßig nutze – sowohl für meine eigenen Pitches als auch in der Arbeit mit meinen Klientinnen und Klienten. Zum Pitch Tips Buch » Über mich Ich bin Florian, ich habe zwischen 2007 und 2015 drei Startups gegründet in denen ich immer für Fundraising, Marketing und Vertrieb zustädig war. Zwei meiner Startups erhielten in Summe über 3.000.000 Euro von VCs und Business Angels aus den USA, Deutschland und Österreich . Ich war 6 Monate lang im Silicon Valley auf Investorensuche, habe dutzende Investoren in London, Berlin, München und Wien getroffen. Und unter anderem auch den deutschen eCommerce-Milliardär Oliver Samwer (Gründer: Rocket Internet, Zalando, etc.) als Investor gewinnen können. Seit 2016 unterstütze ich Gründer:innen bei der Investorensuche. Ich unterrichte außerdem an zahlreichen Startup Inkubatoren und Akzeleratoren . Bei diversen Konferenzen halte ich Vorträge, Workshops oder bereite Gründer:innen auf ihren Pitchauftritt vor. Und habe Erfahrung aus sechs Jahren als der offizielle Startup Coach der „österreichischen Höhle der Löwen“, der TV-Startup Show „ 2 Minuten 2 Millionen “ auf österreichs größtem Privat-TV Sender Puls4. Eine eigene Hauptabendsendung mit mir wurde ebenfalls auf Puls4 ausgstrahlt. Mein Wissen habe ich auch in 2 Bücher zum Thema Fundraising und Pitching gepackt. In über 200 Podcast-Episoden habe ich Gründer, Investoren und Innovatoren interviewt. Und jährlich veröffentliche ich seit 2015 Jahren den Startup Report , ein Bericht von und mit Gründer:innen, die im letzten Jahr Investoren gewinnen konnten. Es macht mir einfach riesigen Spaß, Unternehmer:innen mit meinem Wissen und meinen Kontakten auf ihrem Weg zum Erfolg zu unterstützen. Ich freue mich, wenn auch wir uns bald persönlich kennenlernen. WO Man Mich Findet Auf der Bühne Bei Konferenzen wie 4Gamechangers, WU Entrepreneuship Avenue, Business Angel Summit, Podim In Workshops In meinen eigenen Workshops und Vorträgen oder bei Startup Akzeleratoren Im Coaching In kleinen Gruppen, mit Founder Teams und auf exklusiven Founder Retreats Im TV und Stream Bei 2 Minuten 2 Millionen, bei Puls 4 im Frühstücks TV, im Live Stream Referenzen von Unternehmer*Innen Das sagen Coaching-Klienten über unsere Zusammenarbeit 5 mal Danke zu: 1. DANKE für deine absolute Klarheit . Du schaffst es, das Chaos im Kopf zu ordnen. 2. DANKE für deine Geheimtipps, wie man einen Pitch emotional abrundet. 3. DANKE, dass du dir egal wann und egal wo IMMER Zeit genommen hast und du einem gleichzeitig das Gefühl gibst nie zu stören mit egal welcher Frage. 4. DANKE für die mega Formulierungen und grenzgeniale Wortspiele - seitdem habe ich keine Angst mehr und weiß, wie man professionell auf kritische Fragen antwortet! 5. DANKE, dass du sogar im Nachgang noch Support lieferst. Ein Pitch Doktor mit sehr viel Weitblick, Verstand und mit dem Herz am rechten Fleck! Gloria Hiltmair Gründerin, Seitenbunt Die Tipps von Florian haben mir wahnsinnig geholfen und haben meinem Pitch den letzten Feinschliff gegeben. Es ist immer großartig von einem Firmenfremden ein Feedback zu bekommen, da die Firmenblindheit doch immer stärker wird und man so auf Sachen aufmerksam wird, die man nie gesehen hätte. Sehr kompetent, sehr freundlich und super schnell im Feedback. Ich kann Florian jedem nur empfehlen! Andreas Höllmüller Geschäftsführer, Tastery Philipp Lederle Gründer, helpsole Florians Feedback auf unseren Helpsole Pitch war unglaublich wertvoll. Wir konnten uns um einiges verbessern! FREE TICKET Description ViennaUP 2026 returns in style: get ready to kick off a week of bold ideas in one of the city’s most magical locations. For this year’s Opening Night the Vienna Business Agency brings together founders, investors, creatives, and ecosystem representatives from around the world in none other than the Vienna City Hall , a place that best captures what the festival is all about: big ambition rooted in a history of innovation. Beneath the light of the chandeliers, in a space that has shaped European culture, we will start forward-thinking conversations that will carry throughout the entire week as we make meaningful connections, build networks, and grow our businesses. The event is hosted by the Vienna Business Agency, which initiates and curates ViennaUP, our decentralised, community-driven festival brought to life year after year in partnership with major startup ecosystem players from around Vienna – and the world. !! Please note: Only registered participants will be able to attend the Opening Night. Do make sure to secure a ticket in time if you wish to join, as the capacity will be limited. More information about arrival at the location will be provided closer to the event. Agenda The evening combines inspiration, substance, and a touch of surprise, including: an official address by Executive City Councillor Barbara Novak welcome words by Vienna Business Agency's own Managing Director Dominic Weiss and Head of the Founders and Startups Department, Gabriele Tatzberger a special keynote by Fredrik Debong, serial entrepreneur and founder of mySugr ... as well as a Viennese buffet with local delicacies, and much more, including the unmistakable ViennaUP energy. Expect exciting encounters and fresh perspectives, all against a breathtaking backdrop. See you in Vienna! Get Your Ticket → View Agenda Eventhinkplay The Story Europe stands at a crossroads As AI reshapes industries and societies, Europe faces a defining moment. The continent that gave the world the Renaissance, the Industrial Revolution, and the foundations of modern science now confronts a new frontier—one that will determine its place in the global order for generations to come. The question is no longer whether AI will transform Europe, but how Europe will shape AI to reflect its values: human dignity, democratic governance, and sustainable prosperity. The Big Question Will Europe seize this generational momentum to build AI-powered ecosystems that are prosperous, sovereign, and human-centered? Our Mission Building an AI-powered, sovereign Europe Human×AI brings together leaders, builders, and thinkers at the intersection of artificial intelligence and European ambition. Through our annual conference and always-on content hub, we foster the collaborations that will define Europe's technological future — balancing innovation with human values, growth with sovereignty. https://ffexperience.female-founders.org.text: Female Founders About FFX FFX Vienna 2026 Next Locations Become a Partner Your Host: Female Founders, the biggest and fastest-growing community for women in tech in Europe. At Female Founders we connect community, capital, and cultural change to close critical gaps in Europe’s startup ecosystem. Through safe spaces, alliances, and bold ideas, we help founders, investors, and leaders build what others don’t dare to. We are courageous, trustworthy, and transformative. What is FFX FFX is not a conference. It’s a curated experience where women show up honestly, connect deeply, and collaborate intentionally. It’s a movement reshaping the European tech landscape and pushing it toward true equality. Together, we walk the talk. We address the topics that usually stay unspoken. We name the elephant in the room. And we do it one city at a time. Join FFX Vienna Fostering change through real connections. (period) Together, we are growing and connecting the female founders ecosystem - advancing equality in the startup world, championing funding fairness, and driving sustainable innovation. We bring Europe’s leading founders, investors, and leaders together to learn from one another and forge relationships that last a lifetime. And yes, this is a women-only event. FFX VIENNA 2026 19-20 May 2026 The Social Hub Vienna Apply here We focus on Quality over Quantity The Female Founders Experience (FFX) is a curated & an application-only event. It is designed to enable real, meaningful engagement among a selected group of founders, investors and leaders from the corporate & tech ecosystem. This guarantees focused networking and in-depth conversations. No bullshit, just business. You'll experience Joy over FOMO Remember those events where you're supposed to attend 5 sessions at the same time while growing your network? Not at FFX. We provide you with a personalized schedule for the entire event - and we guarantee that you won't miss out on any content or connection. We're a FOMO-free zone. Why you should join if you are a female founder Being a startup founder is exhilarating, but also overwhelming and lonely at times. At FFX, you’ll join an exclusive group of carefully selected female startup founders - from pre-seed to pre-exit stage. This is your space to share wins, struggles, and lessons learned - openly and without judgment. No judgement. Just support. Why you should join if you are a female investor Early-stage investing is all about people. At FFX, you’ll connect with other female investors - business angels, LPs, VC representatives as well as Institutional Investors - with at least two active startup-investments. Gain direct access to promising founders, expand your deal flow, and discover new opportunities for co-investment within a powerful circle of peers you can trust. Find co-investors. Find founders. Why you should join if you are a female leader Leading as a woman comes with unique challenges. At FFX, you’ll meet female leaders shaping the ecosystem - in politics, corporates, or other sectors driving change. Build meaningful peer connections, strengthen your influence, and accelerate your path to the next level of leadership. Grow your network. Speed up your career. unique & curated What participants say about FFX “This has been the best event! It’s truly touching that you’ve organized everything so thoughtfully for us. I really hope FFX will take place again next year!" "Bringing together all the women for a closer and more authentic networking opportunity was greatly appreciated. You have exceeded your goal by more than 100%. This kind of event is unique, and we are looking forward to the next FFX.” “I loved the experience - it was inspiring, empowering and made me reflect. I learned a lot and I want to continue to invest even more in supporting other women.” Preliminary Agenda for FFX Vienna 2026 Please note that the agenda is subject to change. Basics for company founding in Vienna FREE TICKET Description This workshop provides a practical guide for founders and startups, covering everything you need to know before, during, and after starting your business with a trade license . Topics include: -Before founding: choosing the right legal form, understanding types of trades (free vs. regulated), planning finances, and exploring funding opportunities (e.g., NeuFöG) -During founding: registering your trade license in Vienna, entering the commercial register, and setting up commercial social insurance -After founding: understanding taxes, managing ongoing compliance, and navigating social insurance (including part-time self-employment) After the seminar, participants will have the opportunity to connect with experts in these areas to ask questions and get practical advice tailored to their business. https://viennaup.flave.world/user/events.text: Programme Log in From Pitch to Patient: How Digital Health and AI actually make it into Practice To book a ticket please kindly register or log in here . Tickets General Admission Last time this event was completely overbooked, so we decided to offer two types of tickets this time: Standard Ticket with granted access, reserved seat, networking & buffet Free ticket for startups and students, depending on availability, please register below for our waiting list. 96,00 EUR Startups & Students Free ticket for startups and students, depending on availability, please register for our waiting list and give us a good reason why you need to be part of this Meetup! We will let you know, about one week in advance, whether we have any free seat and then invite you for the final registration. FREE TICKET Description There are plenty of new HealthTech ideas – and some actually have the potential to change the healthcare system ! At the Meetup we bring startups and professionals from hospitals, care facilities, and medical practices together and focus on real problems in healthcare, concrete solutions, and an honest look at what works in practice. Beyond individual improvements, we explore how technological innovation has the potential to fundamentally transform healthcare systems, making them more efficient, accessible, and patient-centered. Through short keynotes, startup pitches, use cases and interactive discussions, we show how innovations can be designed to ease workflows, benefit patients, and integrate into existing structures. Whether you're a founder, physician, nurse, manager, or IT professional – if you want to help ensure that innovation in healthcare doesn't get stuck in pitch decks but actually reaches patients and teams, driving systemic change in the process, you're in the right place. If you are a startup and interested in presenting your solution at the event, you can apply here . Tickets ViennaUP | Lab to Leader Full-day ViennaUP track on building future-proof cofounder teams and scaling-ready startups. May 20 | 09:00-15:00 | TU in the Sky, Getreidemarkt 9, 1060 Wien FREE TICKET Description REGISTRATION IS OPEN - All applications are reviewed and we are actively accepting attendees. Future-Proof Cofounder Teams & Scaling-Ready Startups for the Next Generation of Innovation Transform research into ventures built to scale. This full-day track tackles the make-or-break challenges every science startup faces: finding the right cofounder and scaling successfully. What to Expect Cofounder Matching Pitches A joint initiative from AIT, BOKU, MedUni Wien, TU Wien, UniWien, WU Wien and Xista focused on bringing academic spinoffs together with business cofounders. Local and international spinoffs pitch with dedicated networking zones to connect with potential cofounders. Konsultori Deep Dives Panel: "Cofounder and Scaling Stories-Wins, Woes & Needs" moderated by Petra Wolkenstein. Hear real founders share what worked, what failed, and what they needed from RTOs and entrepreneurship programs. Keynote: "Aligning for Success - Building Future-Proof Cofounder Teams" with Michael Kubiena. Get actionable insights on forming future-proof cofounder teams. Session: "How to Build a Dream Team: Why Interdisciplinarity is Key", New Venture Scouting. Plus networking booths and topic-focused discussions throughout the day. Who Should Come? Science entrepreneurs, aspiring cofounders, spin-offs in formation, pre-scaleups, and accelerator or entrepreneurship program managers. Organised by: Konsultori & Vienna Spin-Off Project (AIT, BOKU, Medizinische Universität Wien, TU Wien, Universität Wien, WU Wien, Xista). Sponsored by AWS. Please get your ticket in the external ticket shop Get your Ticket Description Two major platforms unite to deliver a broader, more inclusive experience designed for global growth. Road to Global x Tech Summit brings together cultures, industries, opportunities, and meaningful connections in a dynamic two-day program built to accelerate international expansion. Following last year’s milestone of over $20 million in signed deals, this event once again connects you with global partners, new markets, and high-impact networks. Learn how leaders succeeded, where they failed, and what comes next. Across Europe, many events may look similar on the surface yet the world is being reshaped at an unprecedented pace. In this rapidly evolving landscape, remaining confined to a single local market is often the greatest barrier to growth. The path forward is clear: expand into new markets, build international partnerships, and extend your boundaries beyond borders. This year, we are building a far stronger bridge between Europe and Asia. Road to Global, born in Vienna, has become a trusted meeting point for partners and ecosystems from dozens of countries. Tech Summit, one of Asia’s leading innovation platforms, has enabled major cross-border collaborations across multiple markets. Now, these two powerful platforms are joining forces to offer you something greater. At Road to Global x Tech Summit, you will discover concrete pathways to international expansion and form high-value global partnerships that can transform your growth trajectory. If you are ready to move beyond limits and step into global markets, we look forward to welcoming you in Vienna. https://wsa-global.org/2025/10/18/wsa-gl.text: About Awards Mission UN Context WSIS Context Board WSA Team Contact FAQs Participate WSA Award Benefits Timeline Rules Apply Young Innovators Benefits Timeline Rules Apply Partner Awards Winners WSA Winners WSA ix3 Winners’ Stories Winners’ Impact Network National Experts National Experts Expert’s Corner Youth Community Youth Ambassadors Youth Community Jurors Speakers Patrons Partners Strategic Partners Hosting Partners Sponsoring Partners Media Partners Events Global Congress Jury Events EYIF UniVation Innovation Events Partner Events Media News & Events Press Releases Clippings Publications Newsletter WSA Global Congress in Vienna Scaling Digital Solutions: For People & Planet May 19-22 | Vienna, Austria The WSA Global Congress is coming home to its roots in Austria! Expect to make valuable connections, learn new perspectives, and to plug in to a community that believes tech can bring about positive change. Connecting all of that with the agenda 2030 and an ongoing cooperation with the UN, the WSA Global Congress connects digital innovation directly to the achievement of the UN Global Goals , turning mindful ideas into measurable global impact. Get your tickets! Secure your tickets for an inspiring three-day experience! Kick it off with the Congress Days on May 20 & 21 focusing on networking, knowledge exchange, and our winner pitches. Our Workshop Day on May 22, organized in cooperation with the Austrian Business Agency, follows up with specialized series of hands-on workshops, tailored discussions on startup scaling. Or join us for the festive closing night at Jugendstiltheater for our Award Ceremony and, bringing together global innovators and changemakers to celebrate. Conference Days May 20 & 21 Workshop Day May 22 Award Ceremony & Gala Dinner Topics Agenda Winners Key Participants Barbara Novak welcome statement Why Vienna Visas Partners Topics Digital Sovereignty vs. AI | Control, Choice, Community AI is shaping how we work, learn, and promises great solutions. But digital sovereignty is slipping: control sits far from the people affected, and systems built without transparency or diversity restrict our choices and weaken trust. Let’s discuss what could change when communities reclaim agency over their data, tools, and decisions and how AI can be built with accountability, equity, and shared governance at the core. Global Impact Solutions | Built for Real Needs Impact startups are building the solutions we urgently need - tackling climate, inclusion, education, and health - but often struggle to gain funding and support in systems copying Silicon Valley standards. Let’s share best practices how to level the playing field and support founders and their ventures built for real need. Let’s learn how about their value for communities, not just shareholders, and ensure the digital economy serves everyone. Building Digital Public Goods | Meeting Community Demands Digital public infrastructure provides access to services, opportunities and participation, however yet many communities, especially in rural or marginalized areas, remain excluded. When essential tools are privately owned or unevenly deployed, digital divides deepen. Let’s hear global perspectives how we build shared digital foundations that are open, inclusive, ensuring everyone can benefit from and contribute to the digital future. Five tech giants shouldn’t define our digital lives, own our data and choices. It’s time to pause, reflect and reset. Tickets Onco:Innovate Ticket For our Onco:Innovate Friends & Partners FREE TICKET Description Onco:Innovate is a multidisciplinary conference at the intersection of a high-level oncology conference and a modern startup & innovation event. The conference focuses on highlighting trends in oncology, overcoming barriers to market entry and creating impactful partnerships in the fight against cancer. We bring together leading experts from across the oncology ecosystem, including innovators, hospitals, pharma & corporates, patient organizations, policymakers, payers, NGOs and investors, to spotlight emerging trends, address barriers to market access, and build partnerships that accelerate the adoption of impactful cancer innovations. From medical breakthroughs and precision therapies to digital and AI-driven solutions, funding models, and regulatory strategies, Onco:Innovate amplifies the patient perspective to improve access, quality of life, and outcomes. This is where collaboration turns innovation into better cancer care. Join us and help shape the future of oncology. Agenda From Breakthroughs to Bottlenecks - When oncology innovation moves faster than access and administration. Strategies to bridge the gap between discovery and delivery. AI & Digital Transformation in Cancer Care: How AI and digital technologies are enabling more precise, efficient, and patient-centred oncology solutions. Collaborating for Impact: Building Networks, Ecosystems, and Funding Pathways in Oncology - Sharing insights on creating partnerships and consortia that foster innovation, accelerate research, and support sustainable oncology solutions. Current Oncology Market Dynamics, Challenges & Solutions - Exploring market trends, challenges, and strategies for effectively navigating the European oncology landscape to optimize innovation adoption. Policy, Regulation & Market Access: Strategies & Best Practice - Analyzing policy frameworks, regulatory pathways, and market access strategies to ensure innovative oncology treatments reach patients efficiently. Funding Models for Oncology Innovators - Exploring how investors support the development and commercialization of breakthrough oncology technologies. Disruptive Innovation in Oncology: Precision Therapies and Next-Gen Diagnostics - Examining emerging therapies, precision medicine, and cutting-edge diagnostic tools that are transforming the way cancer is detected and treated. Prevention, Patient-Centric Care & Quality of Life - Highlighting approaches to improve patient outcomes, enhance quality of life, and emphasize preventive care in modern oncology practices. Oncology Innovation Demo Day - Presentation of market ready innovative solutions, startups and scaleups Accessibility Wheel-chair accessible venue 21.05.2026 09:00 - 15:00 Future Health Lab, Alfred-Adler-Straße 1, 1100 Wien, Austria Please note that photos and video may be taken during the event for documentation or promotion purposes. Includes access to all sessions and networking. 25,00 EUR Description We're racing toward "faster, bigger, newer" — but building the future without upgrading the builders. 72% of innovators face mental health challenges. AI advances exponentially while human capacity stays unchanged. INSIDEOUT Summit 2026 isn't another conference. It's an immersive experience where 300+ founders, investors, and innovation leaders from 10+ countries explore what happens when inner growth drives outer impact. Through keynotes, panels, lightning talks, a startup showcase, and formats like Lego Serious Play networking, you'll walk away with: New perspectives on leading in a world that moves faster than we do Real connections rooted in shared purpose, not business card exchanges Practical tools for resilience and high performance as an innovator Four themes. One day. A shift in how you build. Human 2.0 · Purposeful Innovation · Authentic Connection · Growth Unlocked Ready to build the future from the inside out? Agenda 09:30-10:30 - Registration & Breakfast - Doors open. Take your time to arrive, check in, and settle into the space. Pick up your badge, ease into the atmosphere, and start the day with relaxed, meaningful conversations. Enjoy a warm breakfast powered by Purora - a simple, comforting start designed to bring people together before the day unfolds. 10:30-10:50 - Opening - We begin by coming together. Opening remarks by our co-host partner Mastercard Austria and hosting partner weXelerate set the tone for the day, welcoming you into the experience, sharing what lies ahead, and inviting you to be fully part of the conversations to come. Speaker: Eleftherios Kousakis - Vice President, Account Management, Mastercard 10:50-11:15 - Keynote: Thriving Through Uncertainty - Pressure, change and uncertainty are increasing - and it's hard to sustain your thinking and performance under these conditions. In this session you'll learn five evidence-based domains that elite performers use to maintain clarity, focus, and impact when everything feels unstable. Learn how to regain your sense of control, and build the habits and skills to sustain your decision making, energy and performance through pressure, change and uncertainty. Practical tips, grounded in neuroscience and psychological research to consistently perform at your best. Speaker: Phil Dobson - Founder, BrainWorkshops 11:15-11:50 - Lightning Talks - Five ideas. Five voices. Five short moments that might stay with you longer than expected. Powered by FFG, this session brings together a curated lineup of innovators presenting solutions that are actively shaping a better world, from bold concepts to real, funded initiatives already in motion. Expect a series of 5-minute lightning talks: concise, inspiring stories that offer a glimpse into what’s possible when innovation meets purpose Speakers: Kris Hofmann - Creative Director, Vox Body Armin Knöbl - Chairman, Silosophie Gabriella Chihan Stanley - Founder & Team Lead, Shrine Tayebeh Saghaei - Founder, SpinCell Stefan Wöhrer - CEO, OWNER and System Developer, HOMIT Verkehrswegebau FlexCo 11:50- 12:20 - Panel: “Humanizing Impact Finance” - As part of INSIDEOUT Summit’s core theme - “Humanizing Innovation” - this panel explores the idea that meaningful, lasting impact begins with people, not just capital or products. “Humanizing Impact Finance” brings together voices from across the ecosystem to discuss how financial decisions can be guided by empathy, ethics, and real human needs. From investors to founders, the conversation will highlight how purpose-driven capital can create sustainable change, why human-centered approaches matter more than ever, and how impact finance can move beyond numbers to truly transform communities. Speakers: Margit Mayr - Impact Investment Manager, Erste Social Finance Holding Johann Heep - Social Banking Expert at Erste Group Social Banking Wolfgang Weingraber - CEO & Co-Founder, byeagain GmbH Moderator: Petra Capin - Co-founder, tech2impact 12.20-12:40 - Coffee break - Grab a cup and recharge for what’s next. A great moment to reflect - or meet someone new. 12:40-13:30 - Roundtable Discussions: Where Ecosystems meet - Collaboration in Practice - Collaboration sounds great on stage. In practice, when startups, corporates, funders, researchers, and humanitarian organizations come together, it can often be slower and more complex than expected, with different expectations, timelines and ways of working. This roundtable, hosted by REDpreneur (the Austrian Red Cross’ global social innovation program), brings together 5–6 parallel table conversations with people from across the system. Whether you are a founder, funder, corporate, operator, or researcher, we invite you to join a real exchange on what makes collaboration work, where it breaks, and how innovation grounded in real human needs, humanitarian work included, can emerge when different worlds succeed in connecting. No pitching. No panels. Just a few table, a few questions, and the kind of conversation you usually only get over dinner. 12:40-13:30 - Moderated Networking - LEGO® Serious Play® - A playful, moderated networking session using LEGO® Serious Play®, designed to spark meaningful connections, fresh perspectives, and engaging conversations in an interactive and inspiring way. Speaker: Andreas Spengel - Senior Vice President, Digital Partners, Central Europe - Mastercard 15:00- 15:30 - Panel Discussion "Inside Funding Devisions" - “Growth Unlocked” VC Panel, powered by Mastercard , featuring insights on investment trends and scaling ventures. In this fireside chat, two founders take the stage to share the journeys behind what we often simply call “success.” Through personal stories, pivotal decisions, and lessons learned along the way, they offer a more human perspective on building something meaningful. Expect real insights, honest reflections, and moments that go beyond the highlight reel. Wir sind selbst Unternehmer und Investoren und wollen unsere Erfahrungen und unser Wissen mit Kunden und Partnern teilen. Wir gehen den ganzen Weg Beratung und Konzepte sind nur der Anfang. Wir geben nicht so schnell auf, krempeln die Ärmel hoch und erzielen Ergebnisse. Innovative Lösungen Mit unseren innovativen Formaten in Beratung und Training finden wir immer die für unsere Kunden passenden, zukunftsweisenden Lösungen. Wir befähigen zu langfristigem Erfolg Wir befähigen Unternehmer, die Fähigkeiten aufzubauen, um ihre Herausforderungen zu meistern und langfristig erfolgreich zu sein. Wir erwarten von den Unternehmern und von uns selbst, dass wir Verantwortung für eine nachhaltige Zukunft übernehmen - für das Unternehmen und darüber hinaus. Wir glauben an die Kraft der Zusammenarbeit Unsere Kreativität und unser Einfallsreichtum liegen darin, Verbindungen zu schaffen (die andere vielleicht nicht sehen können, sei es konzeptionell oder in Form von Kooperationen), die es den Unternehmern ermöglichen, Herausforderungen zu meistern. Wir schätzen und erwarten Vielfalt Offenheit, Fairness und eine menschliche Note. Unser Team bringt unterschiedliche Perspektiven in unsere Arbeit ein. Wir bemühen uns um eine offene und gleichberechtigte Kommunikation und fördern Feedback und faires Verhalten. Alle anzeigen Die Zusammenarbeit mit Franziska war großartig; sie war uns in einigen wirklich schwierigen Zeiten eine wertvolle Ansprechpartnerin. Ihr Coaching hat uns geholfen, unsere Markteinführungsstrategie zu verfeinern und unseren Pitch während der Kapitalbeschaffung zu optimieren. Vielen Dank euch allen! Stephan Hofmann Minimist War ein richtig guter Tag – intensiv, klar, motivierend. Jetzt gehen wir den Weg gemeinsam weiter. Ein großes Danke an Petra Wolkenstein, die uns durch den Tag begleitet hat. Stefan Reichlin-Meldegg Gradient Solutions Heute habe ich meine Finanzberatung mit der unglaublichen Petra Wolkenstein begonnen. Petra verfügt über eine seltene Kombination aus unglaublich fundiertem Fachwissen, Geduld und Klarheit, die komplexe Finanzthemen zugänglich und sogar spannend macht. Sie hilft nicht nur bei den Zahlen, sondern auch dabei, das große Ganze Ihrer Mission zu sehen und wie Sie diese wirklich nachhaltig gestalten können. Ich bin fest davon überzeugt, dass sie derzeit die Beste in Wien ist! 🚀 Rita Laila Fussenegger AufAtmenWG Petra war von Anfang an ein wichtiger Teil von Howie. Was als vorübergehendes Executive Coaching begann, um mir bei der Bewältigung der Herausforderungen als Solopreneur zu helfen, hat sich in den letzten zwei Jahren, in denen wir das Unternehmen ausgebaut haben, zu einer vertrauensvollen, langfristigen Partnerschaft entwickelt. Ihre Klarheit, Strukturiertheit und Fähigkeit, Komplexität zu durchschauen, waren in Zeiten hohen Wachstums und hohen Drucks von unschätzbarem Wert. Darüber hinaus spielte Petra eine Schlüsselrolle bei der Gestaltung unserer Finanzstrategie und der Entwicklung eines soliden Finanzplans zur Unterstützung unserer VC-Finanzierungsrunde. The platform has delivered five research and scouting projects, including reusable e-commerce packaging, sustainable products from spent coffee grounds, and green fuel certificates for aviation. Reinvent & Transform: Reliable Drone Inspections Beyond GNSS Limits An automated drone survey solution enables consistent dam inspections through AI-based navigation and tracking, even in GNSS-denied environments. Pilot trials with Skydio and Dronemajor show its potential to replace manual flights with safer, more reliable, and automated inspection workflows. Reinvent & Transform: Online Monitoring for Variable Frequency Drives ENI assessed non-intrusive technologies for real-time monitoring of Variable Frequency Drives to enable early anomaly detection and predictive insights. The initiative identified Electrical Signature Analysis as the most suitable approach and narrowed a highly specialized market to a focused set of leading providers. Strategy & Setup: Professionalizing Innovation to Power the Green Tech Transition Burgenland Energie professionalized its innovation system to support its transformation into a Green Tech player. The initiative defined an innovation vision, created transparency across ideas and partnerships, established clear processes and decision criteria, and set up a dedicated sandbox team. Grow & Build: Vehicle-to-Grid: Turning EVs into Grid Assets A Vehicle-to-Grid (V2G) solution enables electric vehicles to feed energy back into the grid through bidirectional charging, trading platform access, and AI-based optimization. Successful pilots show how EVs can serve as flexible grid assets, helping operators like Moon Porsche balance the grid and unlock new revenue streams. Reinvent & Transform: Advancing Structural Integrity Monitoring for Oil & Gas Assets To address the high cost, risk, and limited visibility of periodic structural integrity inspections for onshore and offshore assets, ENI assessed and implemented advanced structural integrity technologies, thereby reducing scaffolding, downtime, and human exposure in hazardous environments. Reinvent & Transform: Laying the Foundation for Scalable Carbon Capture OMV sharpened its CCUS strategy by assessing how direct carbon capture can support low-carbon hydrocarbon production. A comprehensive market analysis translated this into strategic options and investment hypotheses, guiding plans to scale CO₂ storage and partnerships across the North Sea, Central and Eastern Europe, and the Middle East. Strategy & Setup: Wertstatt 8: Inventing the Future of Energy from Within Energie AG Oberösterreich built Wertstatt8 as a corporate venture studio to drive venture building and spin-off creation beyond its core utility business. The initiative developed and scaled new energy ventures, including Linus for data-driven energy optimization and E-Fairteiler for community-based solar power sharing. Reinvent & Transform: Reducing Wind Turbine Downtime Through Predictive AI Resulting from the need to reduce wind turbine downtime and maintenance costs, VERBUND piloted an AI-based predictive maintenance solution to anticipate component failures and improve maintenance planning. Grow & Build: Advancing Energy Ideas Through Venture Building OMV used the cross-company venture building format Pioneers.Peak to turn exploration beyond its core business into validated new opportunities. In a three-month program, OMV developed and tested concepts in energy storage, biomass utilization, and CO₂ certificate management, leading to C-level backing and the handover of two validated concepts. Grow & Build: From Idea to Market-Ready Energy Venture TTTech and VERBUND established a clear foundation for a joint corporate venture in high-end, grid-serving energy management by sharpening market focus, customer segments, and competitive positioning. The collaboration resulted in a defined business model, clear USPs, and a concrete go-to-market and launch roadmap. Enable & Mobilize: Venture Clienting as an Engine for Energy Innovation VERBUND used venture clienting to connect industry leaders with startups and implement innovative technologies across the organization. The program turned business challenges into 29 pilot projects with 22 corporate partners in areas such as energy management, AI-based market intelligence, predictive maintenance, and digital process control. Following a successful pilot, the tool was permanently integrated, enabling more informed trading and market decisions. meta: The Manufacturing Day is the leading event for the manufacturing industry during ViennaUP, the largest decentralised startup festival in Europe.
Manufacturing Day 2026
Manufacturing Day 2026
https://www.manufacturingday.eu.text: Manufacturing Day 2026 21 May 2026 | Vienna, Austria Home Agenda Project Expo Become a partner Sponsors Speakers Log in Register Log in Register Log in Register Info Keynote Speaker Infineon Startup Challenge About ViennaUp Manufacturing Day 2026 21 May 2026 | 1100 Vienna, Austria Canettistrasse 6 Novotel Wien Hauptbahnhof Register now Registration open until 21 May 2026 This year's topic: Invest to scale. Manufacturing Day 2026 focuses on one of the most critical challenges for the global industrial economy: how to successfully scale manufacturing ventures into competitive, resilient and globally operating companies . While early-stage innovation in manufacturing is thriving, many promising ventures struggle to move from pilot projects to large-scale production and international market leadership. The reasons are complex, ranging from access to growth capital and industrial infrastructure to regulatory environments, talent availability and collaboration between startups, corporates and the public sector. The event explores how different manufacturing ecosystems support or constrain this scale-up journey, and what enables some companies to grow faster, expand internationally and industrialise successfully. It looks at diverse investment models, policy frameworks and partnership approaches that shape how manufacturing innovation turns into industrial impact. Manufacturing Day 2026 brings together investors, founders, industry leaders and policymakers to identify the practical levers needed to accelerate manufacturing scale-ups: from financing and industrial capacity to market access and global expansion. The focus is on learning across systems, challenging assumptions, and defining what is needed to build the next generation of resilient, world-class manufacturing companies. What is Manufacturing Day? The Manufacturing Day is the leading event for the manufacturing industry during ViennaUP , the largest decentralised startup festival in Europe. During this landmark event with more than 500 participants from over 50 countries, EIT Manufacturing is bringing together startups, key industrial players, investors, researchers and experts to celebrate the achievements and potential of the European manufacturing industry. Renowned speakers from all over the world provide insights into hot topics in the industry, bringing new solutions and ideas to the table to make manufacturing more innovative and thus create a competitive advantage. The Manufacturing Day aims to showcase the latest innovations and technologies that are driving this transition and to inspire the next generation of manufacturing professionals to take an active role in shaping the future of the industry. The event offers a varied and rich programme for and with startups in the manufacturing industry and is a platform for industry representatives to exchange ideas and network. Save Manufacturing Day 2026 to your calendar Make sure to have 21 May 2026 reserved for Manufacturing Day during ViennaUP! Add to calendar Get ready for Manufacturing Day - coming up on 21 May 2026 in Vienna To get into the right mood, walk down memory lane with us and see some impressions from Manufacturing Day 2025 in the video below. We are working hard on creating an amazing programme with outstanding speakers for you. Save your spot and get your free ticket now! We are looking forward to seeing you on 21 May 2026 in Vienna. Your EIT Manufacturing East Team :) We welcome participants from all over the world! Be part of the largest innovation network for the manufacturing industry in Europe. Austria 144 Germany 16 Czech Republic 9 Türkiye 9 Italy 6 Hungary 6 Spain 5 Slovakia 5 Ukraine 4 Netherlands 4 Serbia 4 Greece 3 United States 3 Romania 2 Ireland 2 Kenya 2 Bulgaria 2 Poland 2 Malta 1 Estonia 1 Lithuania 1 Switzerland 1 Belgium 1 United Kingdom 1 Singapore 1 Finland 1 France 1 Taiwan 1 India 1 South Africa 1 Israel 1 Malaysia 1 Total: 242 Who is behind the Manufacturing Day? Hello there, we are the team of EIT Manufacturing East, a group of experts that helps the manufacturing industry to become more innovative, more competitive, more resilient and more sustainable. Out of our office in Vienna, we work with startups, SMEs, large corporations, universities, research institutes and other professionals in the manufacturing sector on their innovation activities and challenges. We support them to find the right partners, solutions, technologies and talents for growing their businesses, expanding their markets, optimising their production and enhancing their efficiency and sustainability. We work with more than 1,000 European industry startups, we collaborate with top-notch universities and research institutes and we bring in all the big and small players from the business side along with the visible and the hidden champions to our innovation ecosystem. Together with the colleagues from our offices in Germany, Spain, Italy, Sweden, Greece and France, we follow a true European approach, enabling cooperations across company and national borders. EIT Manufacturing is the largest innovation network for manufacturing in Europe. Supported by the European Institute of Innovation & Technology (EIT), a body of the European Union, we bring together the leading industry stakeholders from business, academia and research. Fueled by a strong interdisciplinary and trusted community, our activities add unique value to European products, processes, and services – and inspire the creation of globally competitive and sustainable manufacturing. EIT Manufacturing is headquartered in Paris, France and has a network of innovation hubs across Europe: Vienna (Austria), Darmstadt (Germany), Milan (Italy), Gothenburg (Sweden), San Sebastian (Spain) and Athens (Greece). Tickets Open House Ticket Get your Open House ticket to visit the AI Factory Austria AI:AT and coworking space between 9:30 AM and 4:00 PM. The Open House ticket gives you access to the space and the team on site. ❗️Please note: Workshop tickets must be booked separately for each session. Highlights: Hub Tours 📍 Starting point: Reception/7th floor ⏰ Every 30 minutes, first tour at 9:15 AM, last tour at 4:15 PM What to expect: A short introduction: who we are and what happens at the hub (programs, focus areas, community) A guided walk through the hub, including spontaneous interactions with coworkers Time for questions and networking Startup Pitches 📍 Community Area, 2nd floor Schedule: 09:30 AM - 10:00 AM: Newsrooms AI , followed by Zenta Solution 10:30 AM - 11:00 AM: Soneo , followed by Onefold 11:30 AM - 12:00 PM: QBCD, followed by Leibniz Mechanics 02:30 PM - 03:00 PM: Dobriy AI , followed by Tabularasa AI 03:30 PM - 04:00 PM: Aikoom , followed by one additional startup (tba) Format: 10-minute presentation + 5-minute Q&A per startup FREE TICKET Additional Tickets Only available with the purchase of at least one mandatory ticket. Workshop I - AI Opportunity Sprint for Startups (10:00 AM-11:30 AM) During the workshop, you'll identify concrete AI use cases and collaboratively develop initial implementation ideas, including impact and effort assessments and clear next steps for execution. 👉 Join the workshop and turn AI potential into action. ❗️Please note: workshop is limited to 40 seats. FREE TICKET Workshop II - Build your first AI Agent (1:00 PM-2:30 PM) During the workshop, you’ll build a simple AI agent or automated workflow for your startup, including test data, a Monday action plan, and practical tool recommendations to implement right away. 👉 Join the workshop and kickstart your AI automation. ❗️Please note: workshop is limited to 40 seats. FREE TICKET Workshop III - How to Trustworthy AI (3:00 PM-4:00 PM) During the workshop, you’ll get a complete, actionable overview of legal, ethical, and data protection requirements for AI use, map your own use cases to EU AI Act & DSGVO risk levels, and leave with a compliance checklist and clear next steps for safe implementation. 👉 Join the workshop and ensure trustworthy AI for your startups. ❗️Please note: workshop is limited to 40 seats. FREE TICKET Description Yes, we are open! The AI Factory Austria AI:AT opens the doors of its brandnew Innovation Center and Coworking Space during ViennaUP for startups, scale-ups and innovation-driven companies, who want to experience practical, hands-on AI! From 9:30 AM to 04:30 PM you can visit our space, talk to our consultants about our services or participate in one of our free workshops! Join us where the future of AI lives! Registration for Open House and workshops is required, each workshop is limited to 40 seats . ✨ As a small extra incentive, workshop participants will receive a surprise goodie bag ✨ Agenda >> TENTATIVE << Workshop I - 10:00 AM to 11:30 AM AI Opportunity Sprint Identify and prioritize real AI use cases for your startup, including impact/effort scoring and next steps. Workshop Goal: In 90 minutes, participants will identify practical AI use cases for their startup or idea and conduct a quick, high-level assessment of potential impact and implementation effort. Hosts: Ann-Sophie Brenk ( AI Factory Austria AI:AT ) Emanuel Stadler ( Optima-Solutions ) ❗️Please note: workshop is limited to 40 seats. **** Workshop II - 1:00 PM-2:30 PM Build Your First AI Agent Create a simple AI agent or automation workflow you can immediately test and use. Workshop Goal: In 90 minutes, participants will build a simple AI agent or automated workflow that they can immediately implement and use afterwards. Hosts: Emanuel Stadler ( Optima-Solutions ) Andreas Schaubmaier & Lukas Ebermann ( Soneo.ai ) ❗️Please note: workshop is limited to 40 seats. **** Workshop III - 3:00 PM-4:30 PM How to Trustworthy AI A clear, practical overview of EU AI Act, GDPR and ethical AI - no legal background required. Workshop Goal: In 90 minutes, participants gain a clear, practical overview of legal, ethical, and data protection requirements for using AI. They will understand the EU AI Act and GDPR in an accessible, non-legalistic way, with a strong focus on immediate practical application. Host: Michael Löffler ( AI Factory Austria AI:AT ) ❗️Please note: workshop is limited to 40 seats. Werde Teil einer Bewegung, die Zukunft gestaltet. Jetzt LONERA Gesundheitsbotschafter:in werden Warum Longevity Hub Austria? Die Forschung ist eindeutig: Wir können heute Einfluss auf unsere Lebensspanne und -qualität nehmen. Doch Wissen allein reicht nicht – wir brauchen Gemeinschaft, Inspiration und Umsetzung. Longevity Hub Austria ist der Ort, an dem kluge Köpfe, mutige Pionier:innen und Gesundheitsinteressierte zusammenkommen, um gesunde Langlebigkeit für alle möglich zu machen. Fakten, die bewegen: Mitglieder, Botschafter:innen, die mit uns lernen wollen 10+ Events im Jahr voller Impulse Starke Partner aus Wissenschaft & Praxis Jede Stimme, jede Idee zählt – gemeinsam schaffen wir Veränderung. Unsere Community Im Longevity Hub Austria triffst du auf Ärzt:innen, Forscher:innen, Unternehmer:innen, Biohacker:innen und Gesundheitsenthusiast:innen. Unterschiedliche Perspektiven – ein gemeinsames Ziel: Mehr gesunde Jahre, mehr Lebensqualität. Zur Community Events Unsere Veranstaltungen sind mehr als Vorträge – sie sind Erlebnisse, die Wissen lebendig machen. Hier lernst du direkt von internationalen Expert:innen, entdeckst neue Trends und baust Verbindungen auf, die dein Leben verändern können. Zu den Veranstaltungen Fragen & Antworten (FAQ) Was ist der Longevity Hub Austria? Der Longevity Hub Austria ist ein interdisziplinäres Netzwerk, das Forschung, Innovation und Gesundheitsinteressierte verbindet, um die gesunden Lebensjahre in Österreich zu verlängern und Langlebigkeit als gesellschaftliches und wirtschaftliches Thema zu etablieren. Warum wurde der Longevity Hub Austria gegründet? Weil die Lebenserwartung steigt, die gesunden Lebensjahre aber stagnieren. Es braucht neue Plattformen, die Wissenschaft, Unternehmen und Gesellschaft zusammenbringen, um Lösungen für Gesundheit, Prävention und Langlebigkeit zu entwickeln. Was ist die Mission des Longevity Hub Austria? Wir schaffen ein inspirierendes Format rund um Gesundheit, Prävention und Langlebigkeit – eine Plattform, die Menschen und Unternehmen verbindet und Österreich als führende Stimme für Langlebigkeit in Europa etabliert. Welche Themen stehen im Fokus? Von Medizin & Prävention über Ernährung, Fitness, Mental Health, Lifestyle & Wellness bis hin zu Biohacking, Wearables, Epigenetik, Unternehmensgesundheit und Forschung & Innovation. Was ist „Lonera“? Lonera ist die Community-Plattform des Longevity Hub Austria mit inspirierenden Events (Talks, Walks, Fest) Welche Events gibt es? Lonera Talk: Paneldiskussion mit Expert:innen aus Sport & Gesundheit. Lonera Walk: Gemeinsames 5 km-Walking „Speedy Walk“ in Wien und anderen Städten. Lonera Fest: Ein großes Lifestyle-Event mit Mitmach-Trainings, Vorträgen, Expo und dem Lonera Award. Wer kann Mitglied werden? Gesundheitsinteressierte, Unternehmen (klein, mittel, groß), Startups, Expert:innen sowie wissenschaftliche Institutionen. Welche Vorteile habe ich als Gründungsmitglied? Exklusives Netzwerk, Zugang zu allen Events, Networking mit Startups, Investor:innen und Forschung sowie „First Mover Advantage“. Wie kann ich Botschafter:in werden? Die das Thema Gesundheitsprävention glaubwürdig vertreten, aktiv mitgestalten und zur Sichtbarkeit des Netzwerks beitragen Welche Rolle spielt Forschung im Hub? Der Hub versteht sich als Brücke zwischen Wissenschaft und Praxis. Mitglieder haben Zugang zu internationalen Studien, Pilotprojekten und Innovationspartnerschaften und können eigene Forschungsthemen einbringen. Wie kann ich den Longevity Hub Austria erreichen? Erika Krizsan (Ecosystem Lead) 📞 +43 664 189 1810 📧 e.krizsan@longevityhub.at Die Zukunft der Gesundheit beginnt heute – und du kannst dabei sein. Werde Teil einer Community, die inspiriert, unterstützt und vorangeht. Jetzt LONERA Gesundheitsbotschafter:in werden LongevityHub – die Community für gesunde Langlebigkeit. Gemeinsam mehr erreichen. https://www.peacehub.tech/conference.text: --- --- PeaceTech Hub Events Conference Organization About Team Volunteer Contact Events Organization About Team Volunteer Contact PeaceTech Conference 2026 Advancing Ethical AI in a Sustainable World May 20, 2026 Impact Hub Vienna 12:00 PM - 8:00 PM Get Tickets Now Add to Calendar Powered By Description Part of ViennaUP AI is transforming everything, but at what cost? Data centers now consume as much water as small cities and their energy demands are skyrocketing. Yet the same technology could help us solve the climate crisis. Because resource conflicts—over water, energy, and climate impacts—are fundamentally peace issues. This isn't another conference about what AI might do. We're bringing together the people actually building sustainable AI systems, shaping EU policy, and ensuring this technology serves everyone, not just tech giants. Whether you're designing energy-efficient architectures, writing the regulations that matter, or advocating for equity in AI deployment, this is where you'll find your peers and make real progress. Who Should Attend? Policymakers Shape the governance frameworks driving ethical AI adoption. Technologists Explore sustainable architectures like RAG and Green AI. NGOs & Civil Society Learn how AI can serve peacebuilding and social equity. Share this event: Speakers Meet the visionaries, practitioners, and policy shapers taking the stage at PTC 2026. Andrei Cursaru Founder & CEO Nexus Group AI Orion Forowycz Founder & CTO Nexus Group AI Kilian Kaminski Founder Refurbed Kambis Vajargah HOD start-up services WKÖ Susanne Supper Managing Director Forschungsinitiative Green Energy Lab Martin Rauchbauer Co-Founder BMEIA Margit Mayr Investment Manager Erste Group Jelisaveta Pavlović Senior Expert OMV Roland Supper CSO Erste Group Lucas Perterer Senior Expert OMV Stefan Humer Lawyer CHG Czernich Rechtsanwälte Marie-Sophie Reitinger Lawyer DORDA Rechtsanwälte GmbH Martin Hanzl Lawyer EY Merve Taner Legal counsel Erste Bank Moritz Weinhofer Project Manager AWS Kasia Sadowska Director Founder Institute Pitch & Chill 2026 Pitch Your Idea Pitch & Chill is our high-energy side event where startups and innovators showcase bold, scalable PeaceTech ideas to a jury. Join us to see the future of ethical AI in action, or take the stage yourself. See below for more details on the startups pitching and the jury. Highlights from PTC25 Pitching Startups The innovative startups taking the stage at Pitch & Chill 2026. Kresko RNAtech ReneTrax SNOW POLYMERS NewSense aitark HASHLYNK Serwas Ethiqs.AI The Jury Our distinguished panel evaluating the Pitch & Chill competition. Verena Gruber Director Western Europe ABA Peiman Zamani Investor 4uVentures Martin Wolf Senior Project Manager Wirtschaftsagentur Wien Agenda 12:00 PM Doors Open & Networking Registration and welcome coffee. 01:00 PM Welcome & Opening Keynote AI, Sustainability, and the New Global Compact Overview of the conference theme and goals, introduction to the structure, and insights into the significance of AI ethics. 01:30 PM Fireside Chat 1 The Promise (AI for Energy) We often hear about AI consuming energy, but this session explores how AI could help us save it. We will discuss how smart technology stabilizes our electricity grids, integrates solar and wind power, and potentially reduces conflict by making nations energy-independent. 02:15 PM Break & Sponsor Slots Networking and refreshments. 02:45 PM Fireside Chat 2 The Peril (Risks & Mitigation) This session confronts the physical reality of the "Cloud." We will discuss the risks of resource scarcity, how data centers impact local communities, and how we can mitigate these risks to prevent conflict over water and power. 03:30 PM Break & Sponsor Slots 04:00 PM Fireside Chat 3 The Policy (Governance & Equity) Technology moves fast, but laws move slow. This session asks how we ensure the benefits of "Green AI" are shared equally, discussing the EU AI Act and global fairness. 04:45 PM Extended Break 05:30 PM Pitching Competition Pitch & Chill Side Event Showcasing bold, scalable PeaceTech ideas to a jury. 07:00 PM Award Ceremony 07:20 PM Closing Remarks & Networking Reception Ready to join us? Get Tickets Now Venue & Location Impact Hub Vienna Lindengasse 56, 1070 Wien Located in the heart of Vienna's 7th district, widely accessible by public transport (U3 Zieglergasse or Neubaugasse). Get Directions Frequently Asked Questions When and where is PTC26 taking place? The conference will be held on May 20, 2026, as part of the ViennaUP festival. We are hosting the event at Impact Hub Vienna (Lindengasse 56, 1070 Wien). Doors open at 12:00 PM, with the official program running until 8:00 PM. What is the core focus of this year's event? Our theme is "Advancing Ethical AI in a Sustainable World." We are moving beyond abstract talk to focus on the dual impact of AI: using it to optimize the circular economy and energy grids, while actively reducing the carbon and water footprints of the data centers that power these tools. What can I expect from the agenda? The day is divided into three thematic "Fireside Chats" and a grand finale: The Promise: AI's role in energy efficiency and grid stability. The Peril: Addressing the environmental risks and resource scarcity (water/carbon) caused by AI. The Policy: Discussing governance, equity, and the EU AI Act. Pitch & Chill: A high-energy competition where startups showcase scalable PeaceTech ideas to a live jury. Who is organizing the event and how can I get involved? PTC26 is organized by PeaceTech Hub Vienna and Nexus Group AI. You can explore our Startup Fair, join networking sessions in the Investor Lounge, or follow our updates at www.peacehub.tech/conference. © 2026 NGAI FlexCo (Nexus Group AI). All rights reserved. SOMETIMES WE LEARN. ZUM EVENTKALENDER FUCKUP NIGHTS FÜR UNTERNEHMEN FUCKUP NIGHTS FUCKUP NIGHTS FUCKUP NIGHTS FUCKUP NIGHTS SOMETIMES WE WIN. SOMETIMES WE LEARN. ZUM EVENTKALENDER FUCKUP NIGHTS FÜR UNTERNEHMEN Falls du uns irgendwoher kennst, vielleicht von hier. FAILURE CULTURE EATS STRATEGY FOR BREAKFAST Die Fuckup Nights sind eine globale Bewegung bei der berufliche Misserfolge geteilt, hinterfragt und die Lerneffekte daraus zelebriert werden. Bei jeder Veranstaltung haben wir drei Sprecher:innen, welche in genau 10 Minuten ihre Fuckups, aber vor allem auch ihre Lessons Learned präsentieren. Die allererste Fuckup Night in Österreich hat 2014 in Wien stattgefunden. Heute gibt es die Fuckup Nights in ganz Österreich und weltweit mehr als 80 Ländern. Wir sind stolz darauf, "the most active entrepreneurs and creators movement on the planet" zu sein, denn wir alle verfolgen die Vision, Scheitern politisch, gesellschaftlich und persönlich zu entstigmatisieren und stehen für einen Mindset, der zum Erfolg führt. FUCKUP NIGHTS THE MOVEMENT Die Fuckup Nights werden weltweit von verschiedenen Community-Leaderinnen und -Leadern entwickelt und durchgeführt, die nicht zwingend miteinander verbunden sind. Auch unsere Fuckup Nights in Wien, OÖ, K, NÖ (und bald auch dem Bgld) sind nicht nur Teil dieser großartigen Bewegung – sie sind die Bewegung – werden jedoch komplett selbstständig und unabhängig organisiert und stehen in keiner wirtschaftlichen Verbindung zu den Organisationen und Veranstaltungen in anderen Ländern. Community creates Mobility is the ecosystem for fair mobility. Our vision is to shape mobility as a common good and to achieve a holistic understanding of a desirable and sustainable future of mobility. Learn more Mission Because mobility affects all of us. Mobility is a key contributor to our quality of life. Because it affects us all, we see mobility as a common good. The joint design of intelligent mobility solutions is essential for the mobility transition. For this to succeed, we need a strong common understanding, a push towards more collaboration and a shared vision for the future of mobility.  The basis mobility as a societal mission and responsibility.  The approach Democratizing innovation processes.  The necessity We can only create the mobility of tomorrow together. community Innovative mobility has many facets In spring 2019, mobility designers launched this joint movement “Community creates Mobility” to create fresh impulses for new mobility concepts. Our network brings together diverse perspectives and expertise from established companies and start-ups, scientific and public institutions, as well as the civil society and is enjoying steady growth.
